name: Missing Cryptographic Step
description: The product does not implement a required step in a cryptographic algorithm, resulting in weaker encryption than the algorithm is designed to provide. Developers may skip resource-intensive steps mistakenly believing they are unnecessary, undermining the entire cryptographic guarantee.
detection_pattern: Look for TRANSFORM nodes (cryptographic operation, encryption pipeline) where the sequence of cryptographic steps is incomplete — a required step in the algorithm is missing. Data flows from INGRESS to TRANSFORM(crypto) to EGRESS or STORAGE without all required TRANSFORM mediators (each step of the cryptographic algorithm: e.g., padding, IV generation, MAC computation, salt application).
